tasks.instruction: For a 28-foot sailboat stored from early winter through mid-spring, compare indoor and outdoor winter storage and submit a reservation for indoor storage if its total cost is less than $400 more than outdoor, otherwise choose outdoor.

criteria.decision_rule: if(indoor_total - outdoor_total < 400) choose indoor else choose outdoor
